translated: They were coming from the house of John the Baptist to there. Jesus the Son of God our Savior is the one who is in our village of Siwu.

text: Misɛ mianyɔnyɔ itɔ̃me nɛ mpia i Ɔko Sekelea ame sɔ, ‘Nnyainyɔ nto lobie ne iiɖe mabɔi isu ifɛ̃ ara itã’ karɔ̃. Alasɔ loiba lokpere mma nsɛ mabu so maturi sɛɛ sɔ mafiniki, ɣɛɛ makpibaradze loba lokpere.” Makarɛ Yesu Ara I Kanya Inyi Iso.
translated: The woman said to the people and the elders of the church of Oko Sekelea's village, 'My child is not a thief, but the one who stole the thing is over there.' text: Ne Petro ɔɣɛ sɔ, “Lokã sɔ ɔnukuare nto loɣɛ! Ɣaa si ɔkpadzɛ̃ me kutsue si iiɖe gbaã iɖe sɔ loiɣe ɔrɛrɛ̃ gɔmɔ!” Ɔluwɛ̃ ne, kɔkɔ ɔɖi kanya.
translated: Then Petro said, "Look at that elephant over there! If I shoot it with this small gun the sound will be heard far and wide!" He loaded it, cocked it and shot.

ref: After King Herod died, an angel from the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph while he was still in Egypt.
text: Gɔ Herodes ɔkpi ne, Ɣaa kpabo ɔwɛ̃ ɔɖi so ɔte Yosef i kurɛ ame i Egipte.
translated: When Herod died, an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt.

ref: Why worry about clothes? Look how the wild flowers grow. They don't work hard to make their clothes.
text: “Be ɔso mito mimararã so i nnɛ miapia iso? Minyɔ ipo ame adziri kumɛgɔ asɛ amɔ. Aisɛ ata ɖɔti ɣee awe sikati.
translated: They say the rivers are full, so where do the fish go to hide? My mother's farm on the hillside has been ruined by the floodwaters. The floodwaters have destroyed the yam mounds and filled the pit.

ref: You are a bunch of evil snakes, so how can you say anything good? Your words show what is in your hearts.
text: Mi ma lonyanyarĩ lɛ maɣɛ! Nda miabara fiɛ miawo ara sɛɛ ɔɣɛ gɔ miɖe maturi lalaa? Alasɔ nnɛ loyi ɔturi ɔtu ame i kanya sɛ kaɣɛ.
translated: I don't have a farm! How can I cultivate when my hoe is still at the blacksmith's place? The reason I went to the blacksmith is that my hoe has broken.

ref: Someone may say, “Here is the Messiah!” or “There he is!” But don't believe it.
text: Ne ɔso si ɔrere ɔba ɔ̃aɣere mi sɔ, ‘Nyɔ, ɔɔnya Kristo i ngbe,’ ɣee ɔrere ɔɣere mi sɔ, ‘Ɔpia i mmɔ’ ne, midaafɔ miɖe.
